title: Senior RevOps Manager
location: USA Remote / Hybrid (NY); Tel Aviv-connected team
description: As PointFive's first in-house Revenue Operations Manager, you'll build and lead the RevOps function from the ground up, blending strategic operations, systems leadership, and Deal Desk responsibilities. You'll partner with Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, and Finance to streamline processes, improve forecasting, and structure high-quality deals. Requires exposure to ARR, CAC/LTV modeling, and SaaS revenue metrics, plus a process- and systems-oriented mindset. Hybrid (twice weekly in NY office) for a cloud cost optimization company.
score_reason: Exceptional fit—building RevOps from scratch is ideal for a senior GTM executive with 15+ years B2B SaaS experience. Strong alignment on ARR/CAC/LTV modeling, forecasting, systems leadership, and cross-functional partnership; cloud optimization sector adds relevant domain depth.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I saw PointFive is building its first in-house RevOps function—this is exactly the kind of greenfield opportunity I thrive in. With 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS revenue operations, I've architected forecasting, CAC/LTV frameworks, and Deal Desk processes that have directly accelerated ARR growth. I'd love to explore how I can structure PointFive's RevOps foundation to support your cloud optimization GTM.

title: RevOps Manager
description: Instrumentl seeks a RevOps Manager with 3-5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, Marketing Operations, or a GTM Systems role at a B2B SaaS company. Strong technical skills required: SQL, complex workflows, comfort with APIs, and hands-on CRM administration (HubSpot strongly preferred, Salesforce acceptable). You'll design CRM data models, connect multiple systems (CRM, enrichment, marketing automation, data warehouse), and make data-driven decisions. Familiarity with enrichment vendors and intent data providers is a plus.
score_reason: Exceptional match: Omri's 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps expertise directly aligns with Instrumentl's need for a technical RevOps leader. The role's emphasis on CRM data modeling, multi-system integrations, and data-driven GTM is precisely Omri's wheelhouse, though the 3-5 year requirement is below his seniority level.
ai_opener: Instrumentl's focus on building sophisticated CRM data models and orchestrating complex GTM tech stacks immediately caught my attention—this is exactly the type of systems architecture work I've scaled across multiple high-growth B2B SaaS companies over 15+ years. Your emphasis on SQL proficiency and API integrations aligns with how I approach RevOps: as a strategic engineering discipline, not just admin work. I'd love to discuss how my experience designing enterprise-grade pipeline forecasting and multi-tool data ecosystems could accelerate your team's growth.
